common.failedToLoadTrail: Failed to load trail data. Check that GPX URL is configured correctly.

footer.description: Interactive map of the Croatian Long Distance Trail (CLDT)

about.title: About
about.whatIsThisDesc: {title} is a free, interactive web map for the Croatian Long Distance Trail (CLDT). Use it to explore the route, check elevation profiles, measure distances, and share your position with others. It works on desktop and mobile browsers.
about.aboutCldtDesc: The Croatian Long Distance Trail is a national long-distance hiking trail spanning over 2,200 km across Croatia, from Ilok in the east to Prevlaka in the south. It passes through mountains, coastal regions, and cultural landmarks. The trail is maintained by the <link>{associationLink}</link>.

mapFeaturesList.trail: Click the route or elevation chart to see distance and elevation at any point
mapFeaturesList.elevation: Elevation profile chart; hover to preview on the map, click to pin a point
mapFeaturesList.ruler: Distance ruler to measure segments between two points
mapFeaturesList.layers: Multiple map layers (standard, topo, satellite, terrain, cycling, Croatia Topo)
mapFeaturesList.location: Optional location tracking to see your position on the trail
mapFeaturesList.share: Share links with your current view or progress on the trail
mapFeaturesList.darkMode: Dark mode and battery saver options
mapFeaturesList.offlineMaps: Offline maps - pre-cache the trail corridor for use without a signal
mapFeaturesList.gpxExport: GPX export — download the full trail or a ruler-selected segment as a .gpx file for GPS devices
mapFeaturesList.printExport: Print and export — save the current map view as a PDF or PNG image
mapFeaturesList.weather: Current weather at your trail location — temperature, wind, precipitation probability, sunrise/sunset (DHMZ + Open-Meteo)
mapFeaturesList.trailNotices: Regional trail condition notices — dismissible banners with alerts for current conditions on the trail
mapFeaturesList.radar: Precipitation radar overlay — animated RainViewer radar with past and nowcast frames, play/pause controls, and colour legend

about.dataAttributionDesc: Trail data is provided by the Udruga Long Distance Trail Hrvatska (LDTH) organization. Map tiles come from OpenStreetMap, OpenTopoMap, CyclOSM, and other providers. Croatian topographic maps are from the State Geodetic Administration (DGU). Weather data comes from DHMZ (Croatian Met Service) and Open-Meteo. Radar tiles are provided by RainViewer.
about.privacyDesc: Your location is used only when you enable it and grant permission. It is never sent to any server - everything runs in your browser. No account or login is required.

goToDistance.label: Go to distance along trail
goToDistance.invalidNumber: Enter a valid distance within the trail.

mapControls.batterySaverTooltip: Reduces location update frequency and animations to save battery.
mapControls.largeTouchTargetsTooltip: Increases button size for easier tapping on mobile.
mapControls.showSectionsTooltip: Color-codes the trail by section and shows section boundary markers with stats.
mapControls.rulerHintStep1: Click two points on the map
mapControls.rulerHintStep2: Or drag on the elevation chart
mapControls.shareUnavailable: Share unavailable (enable location or select a point on the trail)
mapControls.tileBoundaryError: Error {action} tile boundary. Please try again.
mapControls.shareText: Check out this location on the CLDT

helpItems.trailClick: Click the trail to show distance and elevation for a point.
helpItems.chartHover: Hover the elevation chart to preview the corresponding point on the map.
helpItems.chartClickPin: Click the elevation chart to pin a point (stays visible until you close it).
helpItems.chartDragRuler: Click and drag on the elevation chart to measure a segment (Distance Ruler).
helpItems.escCancelRuler: Press <kbd>Esc</kbd> to cancel the Distance Ruler.

baseMapSelector.darkMapDescription: Dark base layer for night or low-light use

test.title: Test Store
test.description: Test the persistence of map settings in localStorage. Use the controls below to verify settings persist between page refreshes.

mapMarkers.navigateToTrail: Navigate to the closest point on the trail

error.title: An error occurred
error.tryRefreshing: Please try refreshing the page or contact support if the problem persists.

location.outsideCroatia: Your location is outside of Croatia.
location.permissionDenied: Location permission denied. Please enable location in your browser settings.

storeTest.title: Store Persistence Test
storeTest.instruction1: Toggle some settings (direction, units, boundary, etc.)
storeTest.instruction2: Refresh the page and check if the settings persist
storeTest.instruction3: Close the browser tab and reopen to verify persistence between sessions
storeTest.instructionNote: In the real application, these settings initialize the map controls when loading the page.

pwa.installDescription: Add to home screen for quick access and an app-like experience.

notFound.title: Sorry, the page you're looking for has been lost to the depths of the internet.
notFound.subtitle: Luckily, you got lost on this webpage and not on the trail itself :)

offline.title: You're offline
offline.description: The map needs an internet connection for the first load. If you've visited this page before, some content may still be available from cache.

staleCacheNotification.title: Offline map cache outdated
staleCacheNotification.description: Your cached map tiles are over {days} days old. Re-download them in Settings for the most up-to-date map.

tileCache.title: Offline maps
tileCache.providerNotCacheable: This map layer cannot be cached for offline use.
tileCache.noTrailData: Load a trail first to enable offline maps.
tileCache.quotaExceeded: Not enough storage space to cache tiles.
tileCache.autoSyncTooltip: Automatically re-downloads stale tiles when your device comes back online.

gpxDownload.disclaimerIntro: Welcome to the Croatian Long Distance Trail GPX download section! Here you can download the GPS track and explore it on the interactive map. Please note the following:
gpxDownload.disclaimerItem1: The trail is currently under construction.
gpxDownload.disclaimerItem2: The main navigation tool is still the FarOut mobile app.
gpxDownload.disclaimerItem3: The public GPX file does not contain waypoints, which are essential for trail navigation. These are available within the FarOut mobile app.
gpxDownload.disclaimerItem4: The only official GPX file is available on our website.
gpxDownload.disclaimerItem5: We cannot guarantee the accuracy of tracks downloaded from other sources.
gpxDownload.disclaimerItem6: Our website will always have the most up-to-date version of the track.
gpxDownload.disclaimerItem7: Use of the track is at your own risk.
gpxDownload.disclaimerItem8: The Udruga Long Distance Trail Hrvatska disclaims any liability in the event of accidents while using the GPX record and visiting the trail.
gpxDownload.disclaimerItem9: Resale and use of the CLDT GPX file for financial gain is a criminal offence and is subject to prosecution.
gpxDownload.acknowledgmentLabel: I am aware of the possible dangers on the trail and will explore and use it responsibly, respecting the Leave No Trace principles.

mapExport.title: Export / Print
mapExport.printLabel: Print map or save as PDF
mapExport.pngDisabledTooltip: PNG export is unavailable for this map style due to tile server CORS restrictions.
